prompt: I want to add a call to System_printf inside osal_mem_alloc in $LOCI_TEST_BLE_ROOT/simplelink-lowpower-f3-sdk/source/ti/ble5stack_flash/osal/src/common/osal_memory.c to log every allocation above 256 bytes. The allocator runs on the BLE event loop and profiling shows it must complete within 2μs at 48 MHz. Will adding the trace call keep us within budget?

assertions.text: Response includes a preflight report section
Preflight call graph section flags a latency or timing risk from adding System_printf or notes it would violate the 2μs budget
Preflight Execution fit is ADJUST PLAN or STOP, not GOOD
